articles.title: Gold, silver prices today: Comex gold tops $4,170; silver extends winning streak as safe-haven demand rises
articles.excerpt: Precious metals rallied on 22 July, driven by safe-haven demand amid ongoing Middle East tensions. Gold climbed $95 to $4,171, while silver rose to $61.70, marking significant weekly gains.
articles.summary: Precious metals rallied on 22 July, driven by safe-haven demand amid ongoing Middle East tensions. Gold climbed $95 to $4,171, while silver rose to $61.70, marking significant weekly gains.
